context: Evaluates the agent's ability to produce a written output when the user explicitly asked for one upfront, rather than defaulting to chat-only.

checklist.name: Produces a written artifact
checklist.description: A file or document is written or clearly proposed as the immediate next step after the recap is confirmed

checklist.name: Matches the confirmed recap
checklist.description: The written content is faithful to what was confirmed in the recap, with nothing dropped or changed

checklist.name: No redundant re-asking
checklist.description: The agent does not ask again whether a file is wanted, since the user already said so upfront
